```md
## How to update
- If you haven't set up a remote, run the command `git remote add RHH https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion`.
- Once you have your remote set up, run the command `git pull RHH expansion/1.15.1
`.
```


## 🧬 General 🧬
### Changed
* Make trainerproc-generated files depend on trainerproc by @rayrobdod in [#9414](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9414)
* Update event_objects.h hex values by @shachar700 in [#9418](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9418)
* Remove need to run make clean when switching between frlg and emerald by @grintoul1 in [#9406](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9406)
* Parallelize CI jobs and cache build tools by @TrevorEdris in [#9528](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9528)
* fix(preproc): Remove unused private field m_scriptData by @lhearachel in [#9581](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9581)
* fix(learnset_helpers): Harden regex-patterns for preproc directives by @lhearachel in [#9582](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9582)
* Silence Makefile map_version message by @grintoul1 in [#9590](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9590)
* docs: added note about BoxPokemon encryption works test by @pkmnsnfrn in [#9619](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9619)
* Pret merge (29th of March, 2026) by @hedara90 in [#9658](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9658)

### Fixed
* Fix FRLG party menu Oak support message window by @montmoguri in [#9412](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9412)
* Fix free match call compile fail by @FosterProgramming in [#9416](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9416)
* Fix GetSpeciesPreEvolution triggering assertf with disabled species by @hedara90 in [#9455](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9455)
* Adds missing include in intro_frlg.c by @grintoul1 in [#9483](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9483)
* Fix battle type doubles for debug battle by @FosterProgramming in [#9486](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9486)
* Fix trailing newline failing tests by @cawtds in [#9495](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9495)
* Fix newlines not working with sprite printing by @hedara90 in [#9502](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9502)
* Fix money amount printed on whiteout by @FosterProgramming in [#9517](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9517)
* Fix assert hits when species are disabled by @cawtds in [#9520](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9520)
* Fix Some HGSS Dex Visuals by @HashtagMarky in [#9534](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9534)
* Fix assert failure on disabled species in Sprite Visualizer by @hedara90 in [#9422](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9422)
* Fix FREE_ENIGMA_BERRY breaking GF Rom Header by @AsparagusEduardo in [#9599](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9599)
* Fix tile allocation for unique egg and species sprite in PC by @hedara90 in [#9613](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9613)
* Split region map layouts by map by @AsparagusEduardo in [#9580](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9580)
* Fix flipped FakeRTC check by @hedara90 in [#9597](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9597)
* Allow make release and check for FRLG by using the BUILD variable by @FosterProgramming in [#9465](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9465)
* Fix dex absences for cross gen configs by @luuma in [#9337](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9337)
* fix: set printer type for AddTextPrinterParameterized6 by @mudskipper13 in [#9628](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9628)
* Fix all-contributors by @hedara90 in [#9659](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9659)

## 🗺️ Overworld 🗺️
### Fixed
* Fix tutor_moves.h files containing duplicates by @FosterProgramming in [#9423](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9423)
* Version specific tweaks of post whiteout script by @FosterProgramming in [#9521](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9521)
* Fix Berry Mutation Chance by @ghoulslash in [#9530](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9530)
* Fixes debug menu Fly Flags toggle by @grintoul1 in [#9607](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9607)
* Corrects music for FRLG maps and some functions by @grintoul1 in [#9606](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9606)
* Fix fateful encounter starting battle with 0 hp by @FosterProgramming in [#9621](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9621)
* Fix timing and structure of Apricorn Tree messages by @BluSunrize in [#9650](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9650)

## 🐉 Pokémon 🐉
### Changed
* Adds Cherrim Overworld sprite by @luuma in [#9442](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9442)

### Fixed
* Fix custom eggs displaying as regular eggs on Storage System by @AsparagusEduardo in [#9603](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9603)
* Fix shininess of form changed battle mon after reshowing battle screen by @cawtds in [#9524](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9524)
* Fixed Kanto dex cross-gen evolutions by @fdeblasio in [#9617](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9617)
* Fix disabled species appearing in evolution struct by @hedara90 in [#9574](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9574)

## ⚔️ Battle General ⚔️
### Changed
* Clean unused function from header by @AsparagusEduardo in [#9541](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9541)
* Fallthrough instead break after ordering by speed by @AlexOn1ine in [#9633](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9633)

### Fixed
* Fix ability reference in Steadfast message by @PhallenTree in [#9389](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9389)
* Fixes U-turn not reseting targetsDone flag by @AlexOn1ine in [#9411](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9411)
* Fix Unseen Fist triggering protection move side effects by @Cle-bit in [#9428](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9428)
* Partial fix to incorrect Throat Spray behaviour, with a fix to summary_screen config that no longer works by @luuma in [#9426](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9426)
* Fix ally targeting moves crashing in single battles by @PhallenTree in [#9433](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9433)
* Fix weatherform change when primal weather leaves the field by @AlexOn1ine in [#9424](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9424)
* Fixes Trump Card's power calculation using its own PP when called by another move by @PhallenTree in [#9445](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9445)
* Missing shouldAbilityTrigger by @AlexOn1ine in [#9447](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9447)
* Fix Lightning Rod activation on fainted mon by @AlexOn1ine in [#9434](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9434)
* Fixes abilities that grant type immunities not outputting battle messages by @LinathanZel in [#9470](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9470)
* Fix order of failure for spread moves by @AlexOn1ine in [#9472](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9472)
* Fixes Knock Off / Ogerpon behavior by @AlexOn1ine in [#9478](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9478)
* Fixes Critical Hit message being printed on fixed damage moves by @AlexOn1ine in [#9489](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9489)
* Fixes Secret Power Terrain effects not being applied by @PhallenTree in [#9492](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9492)
* Fix various stuff not working when hitting substitutes by @hedara90 in [#9487](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9487)
* Fix Magic Bounce reflecting Hazards from a semi-invulnerable position by @AlexOn1ine in [#9501](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9501)
* Fixes Lock On by @AlexOn1ine in [#9496](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9496)
* Fix Magic Coat activation if in Semi-Invulnerable state by @AlexOn1ine in [#9503](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9503)
* Fixes Dancer original attacker/target being overwritten by @PhallenTree in [#9515](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9515)
* Fix Magic Guard activation against Rough Skin by @AlexOn1ine in [#9516](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9516)
* Fix visual glicth during critical capture by @FosterProgramming in [#9538](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9538)
* Fix SafeguardProtected script by @AlexOn1ine in [#9559](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9559)
* Fix duplicate Trick Room end message when used again by @Cle-bit in [#9546](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9546)
* Fix Commander cleanup to only clear STATE_COMMANDER semi-invulnerability for partners by @Cle-bit in [#9598](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9598)
* Fix Commander forced-switch blocking after swallowed Tatsugiri faints, plus Commander tests cleanup by @Cle-bit in [#9609](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9609)
* Fix Mirror Move failing when the target is immune to the copied move by @Cle-bit in [#9604](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9604)
* Fix Wind Power and Electromorphosis triggering before fainting and Tailwind absent-battler ability activation by @Cle-bit in [#9635](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9635)
* Fixed Meteor Beam and Electro Shot being callable via Sleep Talk and Instruct by @LinathanZel in [#9631](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9631)
* Fix ability history recording ownership for Infiltrator, Punk Rock, and Ice Scales by @Cle-bit in [#9639](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9639)
* Fix Ability Shield interaction for Receiver and Power of Alchemy by @Cle-bit in [#9649](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9649)
* Fix Gorilla Tactics Dynamax behavior by @Cle-bit in [#9643](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9643)

## 🧶 Items 🧶
### Changed
* Add better Strange Ball sprite by @kittenchilly in [#9556](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9556)

### Fixed
* Fix negative friendship modifiers not working properly by @FosterProgramming in [#9622](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9622)

## 🤖 Battle AI 🤖
### Fixed
* Fix missing AI handling for partnerProtecting and Well-Baked Body by @Cle-bit in [#9385](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9385)
* Fix AI's inability to use Acupressure on its ally by @Pawkkie in [#9437](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9437)
* Fixes Bide's AI scoring being boosted by being able to boost offensive stats by @PhallenTree in [#9435](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9435)
* Fix for trap effect groundedness being seen incorrectly by @Meister-anon in [#9396](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9396)
* Fix `AI_CompareDamagingMoves` reading incorrect move indexes by @Pawkkie in [#9454](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9454)
* Rage fist fix by @MaximeGr00 in [#9405](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9405)
    - Rage Fist now sees stacks properly for switch logic.
* Retaliate post ko bug fix by @MaximeGr00 in [#9561](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9561)
    - Retaliate damage is now seen correctly for both post-ko and on field damage calculations.
* Fix AI debug timers by @Pawkkie in [#9585](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9585)
* Fix AI using Yawn into Flame/Toxic Orb self-status targets by @Cle-bit in [#9626](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9626)

## 🧹 Other Cleanup 🧹
* Update event_objects.h hex values by @shachar700 in [#9418](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9418)
* Remove need to run make clean when switching between frlg and emerald by @grintoul1 in [#9406](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9406)
* Clean unused function from header by @AsparagusEduardo in [#9541](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9541)
* docs(tutorials): clean up mon_generation tutorial for readability by @kildemal in [#9531](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9531)
* fix(preproc): Remove unused private field m_scriptData by @lhearachel in [#9581](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9581)
* fix(learnset_helpers): Harden regex-patterns for preproc directives by @lhearachel in [#9582](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9582)
* Silence Makefile map_version message by @grintoul1 in [#9590](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9590)
* Fallthrough instead break after ordering by speed by @AlexOn1ine in [#9633](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9633)

## 🧪 Test Runner 🧪
### Changed
* Add tests for Taunt by @Cle-bit in [#9386](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9386)
* `PARAMETRIZE_LABEL` now supports multiple args by @AsparagusEduardo in [#9206](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9206)
* Parallelize CI jobs and cache build tools by @TrevorEdris in [#9528](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9528)
* preproc: generate .size in script_data sections by @mrgriffin in [#9233](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9233)

### Fixed
* Fix partner difficulty and rework tests by @FosterProgramming in [#9419](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9419)
* Fix Magic Guard activation against Rough Skin by @AlexOn1ine in [#9516](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9516)
* Fix test ROM running out of space at 90%+ usage by @hedara90 in [#9623](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/9623)
    - All mon cries in tests now use a single shared cry
